# Valid Linter Note

This note follows standard linter expectations:

## Single H1

There is only one top-level heading above.

## Clean Spacing

Paragraphs are separated by exactly one blank line.

No triple blank lines anywhere.

## Consistent Lists

- Item one
- Item two
- Item three

## Frontmatter

All metadata is in the YAML frontmatter block above.
